tasks.instruction: Order a white standing spray floral arrangement in medium size costing no more than $200 for delivery at a selected morning date and time, include a short sympathy message, and add it to the cart.

tasks.instruction: Create a new public online memorial using a classic-style template with a blue theme, choose a non-default portrait image, enter the person’s basic life dates and a short biography, enable both the guestbook and candle lighting features, and save the memorial.

expected_values.biography: Maria was a devoted teacher, mother, and community volunteer.

tasks.instruction: Find a memorial for someone who passed within the last 30 days and post three distinct condolence messages to the guestbook, each from a different person and relationship.

guestbookMessages.name: Emily Clark
guestbookMessages.message: You will be deeply missed at the office. My thoughts are with your family.

guestbookMessages.name: Michael Johnson
guestbookMessages.message: I will always cherish our childhood memories.

guestbookMessages.name: Grace Lee
guestbookMessages.message: Thank you for your kindness and generosity over the years.

tasks.instruction: Use the pre‑planning tool to configure a traditional burial for someone aged 55–64 with evening visitation and a next‑day service, indicate that no cemetery plot is already owned, select the middle‑priced package with two optional add‑ons under $200 each, and email the quote summary to a chosen email address.
